config.name: creatorAppName
config.help: Optional. Map this when the widget should target another Creator app in the same account.

config.name: approvalRequestsFormName
config.help: Creator form used to store invoice approval workflow records.

config.name: approvalRequestsReportName
config.help: Creator report used as the invoice approval inbox source.

config.name: commentsFormName
config.help: Creator form used to store approval comments.

config.name: commentsReportName
config.help: Creator report used to read approval comments.

config.name: auditLogFormName
config.help: Creator form used to store invoice approval audit events.

config.name: auditLogReportName
config.help: Creator report used to read audit entries.

config.name: booksListFunctionName
config.help: Creator-side function that returns the Books-backed invoice inbox.

config.name: loadInboxFunctionName
config.help: Optional Creator custom API name for the invoice inbox service contract.

config.name: loadInvoiceDetailFunctionName
config.help: Optional Creator custom API name for loading the full invoice approval detail object.

config.name: booksDetailFunctionName
config.help: Creator-side function that returns or refreshes a Books invoice snapshot.

config.name: crmContextFunctionName
config.help: Creator-side function that enriches invoice data with CRM account/deal context.

config.name: approvalActionFunctionName
config.help: Creator-side function that pushes approval outcomes back to Books.

config.name: approveInvoiceFunctionName
config.help: Optional Creator custom API name for approveInvoice(recordId, payload).

config.name: rejectInvoiceFunctionName
config.help: Optional Creator custom API name for rejectInvoice(recordId, payload).

config.name: requestClarificationFunctionName
config.help: Optional Creator custom API name for requestClarification(recordId, payload).

config.name: addCommentFunctionName
config.help: Optional Creator custom API name for addComment(recordId, payload).

config.name: currentReviewerName
config.help: Optional default reviewer name shown in the approval controls.

config.name: useMockData
config.help: Optional. Set to true only when you intentionally want local mock preview data instead of live Creator data.

config.name: inboxDefaultStatusFilter
config.help: Optional default status filter for the invoice inbox. Example: All or Under Review.
